ddt:Target.Name: ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_S1
ddt:Target.Description:
1. Vehicle : L43 2. GMP : M4R Gasoline CVT2 3. ECM : EWR12 (Hitachi) 4. xml editor : Toshikazu SASAKI (toshikazu.sasaki.yu@hitachi.com) Seokju KIM (seokju.kim@renaultsamsungm.com) 5. Release History 1) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v1.0 (by Seokju KIM,20080615) - based on "ECM_L43&L47_Hitachi_draft_2.xml" from Mr.Sasaki - sorted out Gasoline reltive data 2) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v2.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080822) - Modify Diagnosis information for L43_M4R_SOFT4 - Correct errors in check database function 3) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v3.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080826) - Modify DeviceName 5) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v4.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080904) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT4 - Add missed DID items - Correct endian rules - Correct data setting(size, unit, bitrate) - Status Request Button added in SCREEN 6) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v5.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20081017) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT4.2 7) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v5.1 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20081021) - Correct IOCBLID service(DEC->HEX) 8) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v6.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI.2009.01.28) - Modify Diagnosis information for L43_M4R_SOFT5.2 9) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v7.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20090602) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT7 10) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_011070 (by SeokjuKIM,20090603) - Modigy SCREEN
9) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_PS (by SeokjuKIM.20090603)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
Circuit which is Superimposed a Signal Voltage
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component Operation Prevented by an Obstruction
Evap System Purge Control Valve Circuit
Evap System Purge Control Valve Circuit High
Evap System Purge Control Valve Circuit Low
Evap System Purge Control Valve Circuit Shorted
Evap System System Leak Detected (large leak)
Evap System System Leak Detected (positive press)
Evap System System Leak Detected (small leak)
Evap System Vent Control Circuit Open
Evap System Vent Control Circuit Shorted
Fuel Temperature Sensor A Circuit High
Fuel Temperature Sensor A Circuit Low
Fuel Temperature Sensor A Circuit Performance
Idle Air Control System RPM Higher Than Expected
Idle Air Control System RPM Lower Than Expected
Knock Sensor 1 Circuit - Bank 1 or Single Sensor
ECM/PCM Power Relay Sense Circuit Performance
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit
O2 Sensor Heater Circuit - Bank 1 Sensor 1
O2 Sensor Heater Circuit - Bank 1 Sensor 2
